entry.name: compactView
entry.label: Show a single application-menu button instead of the full menubar

entry.name: allScreens
entry.label: Track application menus on all screens

entry.name: fillWidth
entry.label: Expand to fill remaining panel space

entry.name: hideWhenEmpty
entry.label: Hide the widget when no application menu is available

entry.name: showApplicationName
entry.label: Show the application name before the menu

entry.name: appNameMarginBefore
entry.label: Margin before application name (pixels)

entry.name: appNameMarginAfter
entry.label: Margin after application name (pixels)

entry.name: itemSpacing
entry.label: Spacing between top-level menu buttons (pixels)

entry.name: hoverCornerRadius
entry.label: Corner radius on hover (pixels)

entry.name: fontSize
entry.label: Font size in points (0 = system default)

entry.name: fontFamily
entry.label: Font family (empty = system default)

entry.name: fontWeight
entry.label: Font weight (0 = system default)

entry.name: appNameFontSize
entry.label: Application name font size in points (0 = system default)

entry.name: appNameFontFamily
entry.label: Application name font family (empty = system default)

entry.name: appNameFontWeight
entry.label: Application name font weight (0 = system default)

entry.name: textColor
entry.label: Text color (#RRGGBB or empty for theme)

entry.name: hoverTextColor
entry.label: Text color when hovered (#RRGGBB or empty for theme)

entry.name: maxVisibleItems
entry.label: Maximum visible menu buttons before scrolling (0 = unlimited)

entry.name: filterByActive
entry.label: Only show menus when the target window is active

entry.name: stickyMenuBar
entry.label: Keep the bar visible when the menu’s window is not active

entry.name: showDesktopMenu
entry.label: Show the generic menu bar on the desktop

entry.name: hoverOpensMenu
entry.label: Open submenus when hovering (while a menu is open)

entry.name: enableMenuSearch
entry.label: Enable in-menu search on Wayland (requires app support)

entry.name: enableGenericMenu
entry.label: Show a generic File/Edit/View/Help menu when the app does not export a global menu
